name: betynz-web
description: Betynz v6.2 live database dashboard with automatic fixture population and lightweight PWA startup.

scripts.test:frontend: node --check runtime-config.js && node --check data-source.js && node --check nav-core.js && node --check experience.js && node --check boot.js && node --check app.js && node --check rebel-engine-core.js && node --check olympian-engine-core.js && node --check service-worker.js
scripts.check: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:database && npm run test:navigation && npm run test:engines && npm run validate && npm run test:server
scripts.test:engines: node tests/rebel-engine-tests.js && node tests/rebel-goal-correction-tests.js && node tests/ppg-direction-agreement-tests.js && node tests/universal-gg-rule-tests.js && node tests/universal-ppg-defence-rules-tests.js
